title: Harden migracion_proyecto.py: never silently overwrite target-owned files (verifier-c finding)
description: Edit .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py ONLY. (1) MAIN FIX: when the TARGET already has .claude/settings.json, ORCHESTRATION.md, USAGE.md, or a colliding-name file under .claude/agents/ or .claude/skills/harness-status, do NOT silently overwrite: without --force print [SKIP-EXISTS] and leave the target's file intact (report tells the human to diff manually); with --force back up each colliding file by RENAME to <name>.bak-<n> before copying (never delete), and print [BACKUP]+[COPY]. The .harness collision gate stays exactly as is. (2) MINOR: when the target path exists but is a file, the refusal must say 'is not a directory' (currently says 'does not exist'). (3) Update the module docstring and the final report wording accordingly. Acceptance: (a) fresh scratch target with its own settings.json + one colliding agent file + one non-colliding agent file: run without --force -> collisions SKIPped and byte-identical afterwards, non-colliding agent still copied; (b) run with --force -> .bak-1 renames exist with original content, new files copied; (c) re-run --force again -> .bak-2 (no clobber of bak-1); (d) file-as-target message says 'is not a directory'; (e) probes a-e of T-032 still pass unchanged on a clean target (no regression); (f) py_compile clean. Replayable evidence in handoff.

notes.note: plan: extend the T-032 never-overwrite principle to .claude/settings.json, ORCHESTRATION.md, USAGE.md, and colliding files under .claude/agents/ + .claude/skills/harness-status (per-file guard: SKIP-EXISTS w/o --force, BACKUP-by-rename+COPY w/ --force); fix 'is not a directory' message; edit .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py only

PROBES a-f replayed against fresh scratch targets under scratchpad (git init, NEVER pointed at a real repo). SCRATCH1=t033-target seeded with pre-existing .claude/settings.json (custom MY_CUSTOM_HOOK+perms), ORCHESTRATION.md, USAGE.md, .claude/agents/substrate-worker.md (colliding, fake content), .claude/agents/my-own-agent.md (non-colliding), .claude/skills/harness-status/SKILL.md (colliding). (a) ran WITHOUT --force: report showed [SKIP-EXISTS] for settings.json/ORCHESTRATION.md/USAGE.md/substrate-worker.md/SKILL.md, [COPY] for my-own-agent.md + the 4 other non-colliding source agents; shasum -c against pre-run hashes of all 5 colliding files -> all OK (byte-identical); my-own-agent.md content preserved+source agents present. PASS. (b) re-ran WITH --force: report showed [BACKUP] then [COPY] for every file that now existed in target (the 5 originally-colliding files + all 5 agents, since after run(a) they all exist) -- .claude/settings.json.bak-1 contains the ORIGINAL custom {MY_CUSTOM_HOOK...} content, substrate-worker.md.bak-1 contains the ORIGINAL fake custom text, ORCHESTRATION.md.bak-1 has the original custom heading; new settings.json/substrate-worker.md/ORCHESTRATION.md are the fresh source copies; my-own-agent.md untouched (no .bak-1, no BACKUP/COPY line, not a collision). PASS. (c) re-ran --force AGAIN: settings.json.bak-2, ORCHESTRATION.md.bak-2, .harness.bak-2 all created alongside untouched bak-1 (bak-1 still holds the ORIGINAL custom content byte-for-byte, confirmed via cat); no clobbering of bak-1. PASS. (d) ran against a plain file (not a dir): refused: <path> is not a directory (exit 1), file content untouched; ran against a nonexistent path: refused: target directory does not exist: <path> (exit 1, message unchanged). PASS. (e) T-032 regression -- fresh CLEAN scratch target (t033-clean-target, git-init, dummy CLAUDE.md + src/main.py, no pre-existing .claude/ or docs): replayed all 5 original T-032 probes verbatim: (a) --dry-run -> exit 0, full plan, find -newer <marker> empty, git status clean = zero writes; (b) real run -> exit 0; full CLI lifecycle IN target (blackboard.py status/add-task/claim, lock.py acquire+release, blackboard.py update+handoff, session.py register/list/unregister) all succeeded and target's OWN events.jsonl recorded all 8 events (proves copied bin/ resolves hc.ROOT to the target, not source); .claude/settings.json+5 agents+skills/harness-status/SKILL.md+ORCHESTRATION.md+USAGE.md present; CLAUDE.md dummy content preserved above END marker, source CLAUDE.md appended below; .gitignore got the 5 dedup lines; (c) re-run w/o --force -> exit 1 refused, .harness untouched; re-run --force -> .harness.bak-1 created via rename, tasks/T-001.json (with its notes incl. handoff) + 8-line events.jsonl survive INSIDE the backup (nothing deleted), fresh empty .harness written, CLAUDE.md/.gitignore correctly [SKIP] on this second pass (idempotent); (d) py_compile clean before AND after all probes; (e) migracion_proyecto.py self-propagated into the target's own .harness/bin/. NO REGRESSION -- all 5 T-032 criteria still hold verbatim. (f) python3 -m py_compile .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py -> clean (ran multiple times across the session, always clean).

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay for verifier (produce fresh scratch git repos under the session scratchpad -- NEVER point at a real/this repo): (1) py_compile: python3 -m py_compile .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py -> expect clean. (2) probe a/b/c: mkdir SCRATCH, git init, mkdir -p .claude/agents .claude/skills/harness-status; seed .claude/settings.json with custom JSON, ORCHESTRATION.md + USAGE.md with custom text, .claude/agents/substrate-worker.md with custom text (colliding name -- matches a real source agent), .claude/agents/my-own-agent.md with custom text (non-colliding), .claude/skills/harness-status/SKILL.md with custom text; git add -A && git commit. Run 'python3 .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py SCRATCH' (no flags) from THIS repo root -> expect [SKIP-EXISTS] lines for all 5 colliding files + [COPY] for my-own-agent.md and the other 4 source agents; verify via shasum the 5 colliding files are byte-identical to what you seeded (untouched). Run again with --force -> expect [BACKUP]+[COPY] pairs for every file that now exists in target (all agents, since run 1 populated them), .bak-1 files hold the ORIGINAL seeded content (cat and diff), my-own-agent.md untouched with no .bak. Run --force a third time -> expect .bak-2 created (not clobbering .bak-1); cat .claude/settings.json.bak-1 to confirm it is still the very first custom content. (3) probe d: run against a path that is a plain file -> expect stderr 'refused: <path> is not a directory' exit 1, file untouched; run against a nonexistent path -> expect 'refused: target directory does not exist: <path>' exit 1 (message unchanged). (4) probe e (regression): fresh CLEAN scratch (git init, dummy CLAUDE.md + one src file, NO pre-existing .claude/ or docs) -- replay all of T-032's original probes a-e verbatim (dry-run zero-writes via find -newer + git status clean; real run then full CLI lifecycle INSIDE the target -- blackboard.py status/add-task/claim, lock.py acquire+release, blackboard.py update+handoff, session.py register/list/unregister -- all succeed and target's own .harness/logs/events.jsonl records them; hooks+agents+skill+ORCHESTRATION.md+USAGE.md present; CLAUDE.md dummy content preserved above the merged END marker; .gitignore appended; refuse w/o --force then --force backs up .harness to .harness.bak-1 by rename with tasks/T-001.json + events.jsonl surviving inside it, fresh .harness written, CLAUDE.md/.gitignore SKIP as idempotent; py_compile clean; self-propagation into target/.harness/bin/) -- confirm no regression vs the T-032 handoff transcript. (5) Source-repo hygiene: git status --short in THIS repo should show only .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py, .harness/blackboard.json, .harness/state.json, .harness/tasks/T-033.json as changes (normal CLI churn + my owned file) -- verify nothing else was touched. All probes a-f from T-033.json observed passing by the producer; see task notes for the full transcript including exact scratch paths, seeded content, and comparison hashes used.

VERIFIED (verifier-c, F6 filesystem-hostility lens; override used only because claim moved review->claimed; I am the independent verifier, producer=substrate-worker-2). THE HOLE FROM T-032 IS CLOSED. CODE READ: no rm/rmtree/unlink/os.remove/truncate/open-w anywhere; all writes target-side (rename-for-backup, copy2/copytree onto freshly-emptied .harness, write_text on fresh paths); _copy_guarded_dir walks src.rglob('*')=SOURCE files only so it cannot delete/truncate a target file with no source counterpart; _next_backup_path generalized (first free <name>.bak-n, files+dirs); py_compile clean. ATTACK-(v) CLOSURE: seeded target with custom settings.json(MY_CUSTOM_HOOK)/ORCHESTRATION.md/USAGE.md/agents/substrate-worker.md(colliding)/SKILL.md(colliding)+my-own-agent.md(non-colliding). WITHOUT --force -> all 5 collisions [SKIP-EXISTS], shasum -c ALL OK (byte-identical); 4 non-colliding source agents [COPY]; my-own-agent.md preserved. BACKUP CHAIN: --force run1 -> [BACKUP]+[COPY], .bak-1 holds ORIGINAL content (MY_CUSTOM_HOOK/'MY orchestration - IRREPLACEABLE'/fake substrate-worker); my-own-agent.md got NO .bak. --force run2 -> .bak-2 created, .bak-1 STILL byte-original. File count 30->84, full .bak-1/.bak-2 chains incl .harness.bak-1/.bak-2 -- NOTHING deleted. PROBE d: file-as-target -> 'is not a directory' exit1 file untouched; nonexistent -> 'does not exist' exit1 (unchanged). REGRESSION (T-032 a-e clean target): dry-run zero-writes (find empty+git clean); real run self-propagation+all docs+CLAUDE.md dummy preserved above END marker+.gitignore appended+full CLI lifecycle ok (events.jsonl=8); refuse w/o --force exit1; --force .harness->.harness.bak-1 by rename with T-001.json+8 events surviving inside, fresh .harness 0 events, CLAUDE.md/.gitignore idempotent SKIP marker-count-1; py_compile clean. NO REGRESSION. DISCIPLINE: producer locked owned file (acq 02:05:59/rel 02:10:58), handed off to verifier not self-done; source git status = only owned migracion_proyecto.py + blackboard/state CLI churn + tasks/T-033.json; harness-explainer.html committed (clean).
